description: A lamp with protective case for carrying; portable light for journeys. 'Lumoi' names what guides through darkness—light held and carried.
sound_symbolism: The word lights the way. 'Lu' glows with warm light. 'Mo' holds with stable grip, case protecting. Then 'i' rises to guide, path illuminated.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo lumoi' (the lantern). Portable unlike 'luma' (lamp). For travel, search, guidance through dark.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Lanterns lit journeys—the carried light enabling travel after dark, finding the way.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Guidance through darkness—the lantern as dharma, teaching that illuminates the path.
